I'm a donation based AI fact-checker. Ask me to verify any claim, statement, or news you've heard!\nTry: \"Did X say...\" or \"Is it true that...\"\n## How We Work\n### Built by Brothers, Powered by Community\nTwo brothers built this fact-checking tool for friends and family. What started as a simple project to help our loved ones navigate misinformation has grown into something we're excited to share with everyone. \n This tool is **100% donation-based** and we rely entirely on users like you to keep it available.\n**Just $1 powers ~30 fact-checks.** If this helped you, help us keep the truth accessible for everyone. \ud83d\ude4f\n## How We Fact-Check\n### Government Sources First\nWe prioritize official .gov websites, government agencies, and regulatory bodies for the most authoritative information.\n### Academic & Research Institutions\nWe search .edu domains, research papers, and academic institutions for peer-reviewed and scholarly sources.\n### Reputable News & Organizations\nWe cross-reference established news outlets, fact-checking organizations, and official institutional websites.\n### Smart Source Filtering\nOur AI automatically filters out social media, unreliable sources, and prioritizes credible, authoritative information.\n### Multi-Source Verification\nEvery fact-check uses multiple independent sources to ensure accuracy and provide comprehensive verification.\n### Real-Time Search\nWe perform live searches across the web to find the most current and relevant information for each query.\n### Multi-Language Search\nWe search in multiple languages to gather international perspectives, ensuring a more comprehensive and globally-informed fact-check.\n### Fight Misinformation\nIn today's information landscape, it's crucial to verify what you hear before sharing. Our AI helps you distinguish reliable information from misinformation, rumors, and fake news by searching only the most credible sources.", "relevance_score": 0.85}, {"title": "Airbnb Occupancy Rate Tool - Check Occupancy Data for Any ... - Airbtics", "url": "https://airbtics.com/airbnb-occupancy-rate/", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content] Title: Airbnb Occupancy Rate Tool \u2013 Check Occupancy Data for Any Markets URL Source: https://airbtics.com/airbnb-occupancy-rate/ Published Time: 2023-11-30T10:17:28+00:00 Markdown Content: ## What Is Occupancy Rate? It is the percentage of nights booked among the available nights on an Airbnb listing. How can you find the average occupancy rate of your market? ## How to find Airbnb Occupancy Rates? Simply enter an address above, and it'll show you the average occupancy rate of any address in the world for free! The average occupancy rate is calculated by 10\u201320 similar listings around the input addresses. ## How does Airbtics collect this data? As a short-term rental data company, we've been tracking Airbnb listing occupancy rates and bookings since 2019. This allows us to have comprehensive Airbnb statistics at listing level. Those statistics includes: *   Average Length of Stay (ALOS) *   Average Daily Rate *   Revenue per bedroom *   Average Daily Rate (ADR) *   Guest Demographics *   Neighbourhood Analysis heatmap *   Average Airbnb Booking Rate *   Airbnb Vacancy Rates *   Airbnb Statistics by city *   Airbnb Occupancy Rate Map\n...\n*   Average Daily Rate *   Revenue per bedroom *   Average Daily Rate (ADR) *   Guest Demographics *   Neighbourhood Analysis heatmap *   Average Airbnb Booking Rate *   Airbnb Vacancy Rates *   Airbnb Statistics by city *   Airbnb Occupancy Rate Map The average occupancy rate by Country highlights profitability of short-term rentals across each country, primarily focus on active short-term rental listed on Airbnb. We average data from 3 to 8 major cities using active airbnb listings to reflect market conditions. The data is updated every 3-6 months to track market trends. For detailed occupancy rate by city, select your country of interest. ## How to Calculate the Occupancy Rate of an Airbnb Property? To determine the occupancy rate of a short-term rental property, you need to apply a simple formula to calculate the percentage. Airbnb Occupancy Rate Formula Airbnb Occupancy Rate = (Number of Booked Nights / Number of Available Nights) x 100% ![Image 1: Airbnb Occupancy Rate Formula](https://airbtics.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/09/occupancy-rate-formula-min.jpg) To calculate the Airbnb occupancy rate step by step, you need to: **1:** Define the total number of days for which a listing was reserved. **2:** Find out the total number of days for which it was available for rent. **3:** Divide the number of days booked over the number of days available and multiply by 100 to get a percentage. ### Airbnb Occupancy Rate Calculation Example If a listing was listed for rent for 20 nights in a month and got booked for 15 days, the occupancy rate is: Airbnb Occupancy Rate = (15 / 20) x 100% = 75% While determining the occupancy rate of a single Airbnb property is easy as long as you have the necessary information, calculations get complicated if you want to calculate the average occupancy in a market. In this case, you need t", "relevance_score": 0.85}, {"title": "AirDNA | Short-Term Rental Data Analytics | Vrbo & Airbnb Data", "url": "https://www.airdna.co/", "snippet": "[Jina Parallel Content]
